headline: 12-State Legal Challenge Clouds Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger
summary: A coalition of 12 U. S. states has launched an antitrust challenge against the proposed $110 billion merger between Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros.

headline: Netflix Q2 Earnings Beat, Stock Falls on Revenue Miss, Lower Outlook
summary: NFLX beats Q2 EPS but misses revenue estimates as shares slide on a lower 2026 outlook. See what drives results and the company's updated guidance.

headline: Netflix Sinks 11% on Soft Q3 Guidance as Analysts Warn It’s “Losing Narrative Control”
summary: Analysts say Netflix is losing control of its own story, and a single line buried in Friday's earnings report about future disclosures is making Wall Street more nervous than the guidance miss itself.

raw.headline: Netflix Sinks 11% on Soft Q3 Guidance as Analysts Warn It’s “Losing Narrative Control”
raw.summary: Analysts say Netflix is losing control of its own story, and a single line buried in Friday's earnings report about future disclosures is making Wall Street more nervous than the guidance miss itself.

headline: Why Is Paramount Skydance Stock Falling on Friday?
summary: Paramount Skydance Corporation (PSKY) stock is falling Friday on legal roadblocks surrounding its $110 billion WBD merger and a streaming sector slowdown driven by Netflix.

raw.headline: Why Is Paramount Skydance Stock Falling on Friday?

headline: 1 Unprofitable Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: Unprofitable companies can burn through cash quickly, leaving investors exposed if they fail to turn things around. Without a clear path to profitability, these businesses risk running out of capital or relying on dilutive fundraising.

raw.headline: 1 Unprofitable Stock with Exciting Potential and 2 Facing Challenges
raw.summary: Unprofitable companies can burn through cash quickly, leaving investors exposed if they fail to turn things around. Without a clear path to profitability, these businesses risk running out of capital or relying on dilutive fundraising.
